active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 17 K4 LoCoMo maintenance repair measurement bundle: use Phase 16 opt-in Level 1 tools, isolated repair-smoke writes, model-visible-only proposals, same-slice case movement, clean validation before quality claims, preserve v3 default/v1 fallback/kernel opt-in.

current_phase_objective: Plan the smallest usable K4 LoCoMo repair-measurement loop that creates approved kernel maintenance artifacts in an isolated store and reports same-slice plus clean-validation evidence without treating repair smoke as promotion.

phase_bootstrap_decision.reason: state.json is in GOD_DISPATCH for phase-17 and phase-17 artifacts were missing; bootstrap rules allow only missing phase-local context, dispatch, and planning artifacts in this controller pass.

failing_tests_required_before_implementa: Add RED tests proving repair-smoke maintenance proposals cannot execute if they contain expected answers, expected source ids, judge labels, gold failure classes, or benchmark case ids as executable tool inputs.
Add RED tests proving approved repair-smoke writes route through Phase 16 kernel Level 1 tools and are isolated from benchmark source files and default public runs.

Add RED tests proving before/after LoCoMo comparison reports fail-to-pass, pass-to-fail, unchanged failures, retrieval misses, evidence-hit-answer-fail, judge-questionable, and source metric movement separately.
Add RED tests proving repair artifacts enter v3 context only through archive attachment or approved lifecycle eligibility, not direct context injection.
Add RED tests proving no-LLM/projected smoke cannot be marked as full-chain quality or promotion evidence.

benchmark_and_smoke_commands.locomo_baseline_full_chain: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 10 --run-id phase17_locomo10_baseline
benchmark_and_smoke_commands.locomo_kernel_repair_full_chain: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 10 --run-id phase17_locomo10_kernel_repair_smoke
benchmark_and_smoke_commands.longmemeval_regression_guard_if_default_: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --run-id phase17_lme30_regression_guard

usable_ack_checklist: All plan/execute/review artifacts cite work/phase-17/context_bundle.md and the active goal.
Maintenance repair artifacts are created through real approved Phase 16 kernel tools, not direct demo fixtures.
No benchmark gold fields become executable tool inputs.
LoCoMo before/after movement is case-level with pass-to-fail and fail-to-pass lists.
Source metrics are separated from judged answer quality.
Same-slice movement is labeled repair-smoke only and not promotion evidence.
Default v3, explicit v1 fallback, and kernel opt-in remain unchanged.
Review eval decision explicitly justifies full-chain, smoke, or blocker routing.
review_focus: Anti-demo gate: reject any repair harness that writes fixtures instead of using approved kernel tool calls.
LoCoMo-specific risks: source localization regression, source-miss judge-pass cases, hidden pass-to-fail, same-slice overfitting.
Gold leakage: expected answers, expected source ids, judge labels, failure classes, and case ids must not be executable inputs.
Isolation: repair-smoke writes must not mutate benchmark files or contaminate default public reports.
Default behavior: v3 default, v1 fallback, and kernel opt-in must remain unchanged.
Eval routing: no-LLM smoke cannot satisfy a full-chain quality gate; same-slice movement cannot satisfy promotion.
